---
title: "職災個案演練"
author: "Peter"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: html_document
---
### 1.切割夾捲
  - case 1 [夾捲案1_演練](捲夾案1_演練.pdf)
  - case 2 [夾捲案2_演練](A切割夾捲/捲夾案2_演練.pdf)
  
### 2.火災爆炸
### 3.局限空間
### 4.倒塌崩塌
### 5.感電
### 6.墜落
### 7.熱疾病


| 職災類型 | 演練個案 | 分析參考 | 發布訊息|完整檔案|
|-|:--:|:-----:|:---|--|
|捲夾| [捲夾案1](A切割夾捲/捲夾案1_演練.pdf) |[捲夾案1分析參考](A切割夾捲/夾捲案1分析參考.pdf)|[2023-01-19發布](https://www.osha.gov.tw/media/qm1njbge/111-00813_%E5%87%B1%E8%81%96_%E4%B8%AD%E5%8D%80%E4%B8%AD%E5%BF%83.pdf?mediaDL=true)|[原始檔案](A切割夾捲/捲夾案1_原始.pdf)|
|火災爆炸|[火災爆炸案1](B火災爆炸/火災爆炸案1_演練.pdf) |分析參考1|來源| |
|局限空間| 演練個案1 |分析參考1|來源| |
|倒塌崩塌| 演練個案1 |分析參考1|來源| |



```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:
